name: USS PC-1145 (PC-1145)
events: 2 Aug 1944 USS Escolar (T/Cdr. W.J. Millican, USN) departed Key West, Florida for the Panama Canal Zone. She was to proceed through the following poaitions; A) 22°17'N, 85°20'W at 1254 Q/3 B) 21°40'N, 85°20'W at 1559 Q/3 C) 21°00'N, 83°30'W at 0104 Q/4 D) 16°18'N, 80°45'W at 0146 Q/5
She was escorted until Point C by USS PC-1145 (Lt. J.L Hoguet, USNR).
28 Jan 1945 USS Lionfish (T/Lt.Cdr. E.D. Spruance, USN) and USS PC-1145 (Lt. J.R. Keith, USNR) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from Port Everglades.
